verification.target_vocab_notes: 階段 appears clearly in the sentence as the main subject
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - わたしのいえにはかいだんがふたつある
verification.grammar_notes: Uses N5 patterns: には (particle combination), が (subject marker), ある (existence verb), ふたつ (counter)
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: uses possessive の, には particle, counter ふたつ, and ある verb. Sentence structure is straightforward but has multiple elements
verification.overall_notes: Clean N5 sentence with appropriate vocabulary and grammar. Good example of using 階段 in context.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 階段 is the main subject of the sentence
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かいだんがある
verification.grammar_notes: Simple N5 pattern: X が ある (X exists). Very basic structure.
verification.difficulty_notes: Beginner N5: extremely simple sentence with only subject marker が and existence verb ある. Minimal vocabulary.
verification.overall_notes: Very simple and clear example. Perfect for beginners learning 階段.

verification.target_vocab_notes: うるさい appears in its kana form as an adjective
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - となりのへやがうるさいのです
verification.grammar_notes: Contains のです explanatory pattern, which is N4 grammar. This is beyond N5 level.
verification.difficulty_notes: Upper N5 vocabulary but N4 grammar: のです adds explanatory nuance that's not taught at N5
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 のです pattern. Sentence would be acceptable if it ended with うるさいです.

verification.target_vocab_notes: うるさい used with に particle (particular about)
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かのじょはたべものにうるさい
verification.grammar_notes: Uses N5 grammar: は (topic), に (particle), うるさい (i-adjective). The idiom 食べ物にうるさい uses N5 structures.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-upper N5: uses idiomatic expression 食べ物にうるさい (particular about food), which is a different meaning from 'noisy' but grammatically N5
verification.overall_notes: Grammar is N5, but this idiomatic use of うるさい (particular/fussy) differs from the primary meaning (noisy). May confuse beginners expecting the 'noisy' meaning.

verification.target_vocab_notes: うるさい appears with に particle (particular about)
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - おとこのこでたべものにうるさいのはすくない
verification.grammar_notes: Contains の nominalizer in complex way (うるさいのは), which creates a clause that functions as subject. This is N4+ complexity.
verification.difficulty_notes: Complex sentence structure with nominalized clause, multiple elements. Too advanced for N5.
verification.overall_notes: Too complex with の nominalizer creating embedded clause. Grammar exceeds N5 level.

verification.target_vocab_notes: うるさい appears as adjective
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - となりのへやがうるさいのです
verification.grammar_notes: Contains のです explanatory pattern (N4 grammar)
verification.difficulty_notes: Same as index 0 - N4 grammar with のです
verification.overall_notes: Duplicate of index 0. Reject due to N4 のです pattern.

verification.target_vocab_notes: うるさい used idiomatically with に particle
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かのじょはたべものにうるさい
verification.grammar_notes: N5 grammar patterns only
verification.difficulty_notes: Same as index 1 - idiomatic usage
verification.overall_notes: Duplicate of index 1. Idiomatic meaning may confuse beginners.

verification.target_vocab_notes: うるさい with に particle
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - おとこのこでたべものにうるさいのはすくない
verification.grammar_notes: Contains の nominalizer creating embedded clause (N4+)
verification.difficulty_notes: Complex structure, too advanced
verification.overall_notes: Duplicate of index 2. Grammar too complex for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 半分こ appears, derived from 半分 (halfsies/splitting in half)
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - はい、おにいちゃん、はんぶんこ
verification.grammar_notes: Very simple: interjection はい, vocative おにいちゃん, and 半分こ. All N5 level.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple casual speech with familiar vocabulary. Uses colloquial 半分こ form.
verification.overall_notes: Simple, natural N5 sentence showing casual family speech.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 半分 appears in compound phrase with です copula
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - わたしのいぬのおおきさはあなたのいぬのはんぶんです
verification.grammar_notes: Uses N5: possessive の chains, は topic marker, です copula. Structure is X は Y の 半分です.
verification.difficulty_notes: Advanced N5: multiple possessive の, abstract noun 大きさ, comparative structure. Long sentence with multiple elements.
verification.overall_notes: Grammatically N5 but challenging due to length and multiple possessive markers. Good for advanced N5 learners.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 半分 appears as part of subject phrase
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - わたしのくらすのせいとのはんぶんはいぬがすきです
verification.grammar_notes: N5 patterns: possessive の chain, は topic, が object of preference, 好きです pattern
verification.difficulty_notes: Advanced N5: multiple possessive の, preference structure が好きです. Longer sentence with multiple elements.
verification.overall_notes: Grammatically solid N5 but challenging due to complexity. Good example for upper N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 背広 appears as object of を着ていた
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かれはくたくたのせびろをきていた
verification.grammar_notes: Uses ている form (wearing state) and た past. ている for state of wearing is considered acceptable basic N5.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-upper N5: uses ている form and descriptive の. The word くたくた (worn-out) adds difficulty.
verification.overall_notes: ている is borderline N5. The sentence is acceptable if we allow basic ている for states, but may be too advanced for early N5 learners.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 背広 appears as main topic
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - そのせびろはわたしにはおおきすぎます
verification.grammar_notes: Contains すぎます (too much) which is N4 grammar. This exceeds N5 level.
verification.difficulty_notes: Would be mid N5 except for すぎます grammar
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 すぎます pattern.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 背広 appears as object marked by を
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かれはしんしせびろをもっています
verification.grammar_notes: Uses ている form for possession (持っている), which is basic N5. は topic, を object marker.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: straightforward sentence with ている for possession state. 紳士 adds vocabulary complexity.
verification.overall_notes: Acceptable N5 sentence. もっている for possession is standard N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 映画館 appears as destination marked by へ
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - いっしょにえいがかんへいきましょう
verification.grammar_notes: Uses ましょう volitional (basic N5 suggestion form), と together, へ direction marker
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-beginner N5: simple invitation with ましょう, direction particle, and common vocabulary
verification.overall_notes: Clean N5 example of making suggestions with ましょう.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 映画館 appears as location marked by で
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - わたしはえいがかんでともだちにであった
verification.grammar_notes: Uses N5: は topic, で location, に target, た past. The verb 会う is N5.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: straightforward past tense sentence with location and target particles
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with clear grammar patterns.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 映画館 appears as destination with へ
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - わたしたちはきのうえいがかんへいった
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, time word 昨日, へ direction, た past of 行く
verification.difficulty_notes: Beginner-mid N5: simple past tense statement with time word and direction
verification.overall_notes: Clean, straightforward N5 sentence.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 音楽 appears as object of 聞く
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - あなたはよくおんがくをききますか
verification.grammar_notes: N5: question with か, は topic, adverb よく, を object, ます form
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: simple question pattern with common vocabulary and adverb
verification.overall_notes: Standard N5 question form.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 音楽 appears as object of 聞く
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - わたしはおんがくをききます
verification.grammar_notes: Basic N5: は topic, を object, ます form
verification.difficulty_notes: Beginner N5: very simple declarative sentence
verification.overall_notes: Simple, clear N5 example.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 音楽 appears as main topic
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - このおんがくはすきですか
verification.grammar_notes: N5: demonstrative この, は topic, 好き preference, です copula, か question
verification.difficulty_notes: Beginner N5: simple preference question
verification.overall_notes: Basic N5 preference question.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 野球 appears as main topic
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - やきゅうはすきですか
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, 好き preference, です copula, か question
verification.difficulty_notes: Beginner N5: very simple preference question
verification.overall_notes: Simple N5 preference question.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 野球 appears as object of する
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - わたしはときどきやきゅうをします
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, adverb 時々, を object, する (do/play)
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: simple statement with time adverb
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with adverb usage.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 野球 appears as object of する
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - きょうやきゅうをしました
verification.grammar_notes: N5: time word 今日, を object, past tense ました
verification.difficulty_notes: Beginner N5: simple past tense statement
verification.overall_notes: Clear N5 past tense example.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 降る appears in た past form
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - ゆきがふりました
verification.grammar_notes: N5: が subject marker, past tense ました form
verification.difficulty_notes: Beginner N5: very simple past tense statement
verification.overall_notes: Simple N5 weather expression.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 降る appears in ている continuous/state form
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - あめがふっています
verification.grammar_notes: Uses ている for ongoing state (raining). This is basic N5 for weather/states.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: ている form for weather is standard N5 usage
verification.overall_notes: Standard N5 ている for weather conditions.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 降る appears in present/future form
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - あすあめがふるでしょう
verification.grammar_notes: Contains でしょう (probably/I think), which is N4 grammar for conjecture/probability.
verification.difficulty_notes: Would be mid N5 except for N4 でしょう
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 でしょう conjecture pattern.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 吹く appears in ている form
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かぜがふいています
verification.grammar_notes: N5: が subject, ている for ongoing state (wind is blowing)
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: ている form for weather condition is standard N5
verification.overall_notes: Standard N5 weather expression with ている.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 吹く appears in past tense た form
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - よるにきたかぜがあついかぜをふきはらった
verification.grammar_notes: Contains compound verb 吹き払った (blew away) which is beyond N5. Also has modifying clause structure that's complex.
verification.difficulty_notes: Too complex: compound verb, modifying clauses, advanced structure
verification.overall_notes: Compound verb and complex structure exceed N5 level.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 吹く appears in past tense た form
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - きょうはかぜがふいた
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, が subject, た past tense, time word 今日
verification.difficulty_notes: Beginner N5: simple past tense statement about weather
verification.overall_notes: Simple, clear N5 past tense sentence.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 答え appears as object of 知る
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - わたしはこたえをしっています
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, を object, 知っている (know) using ている for state of knowledge
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: 知っている is standard N5 for expressing knowledge
verification.overall_notes: Standard N5 usage of 知っている.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 答え appears as object of 書く
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かみにこたえをかきなさい
verification.grammar_notes: Contains なさい command form, which is N4 grammar (more formal command than basic N5 imperative)
verification.difficulty_notes: Would be mid N5 except for なさい command
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 なさい imperative form.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 答える appears in ない negative form
verification.kana_notes: Kana has こたえ but needs to match target vocab kana こたえる. However, checking again - target is 答え (noun) but sentence uses 答える (verb). Target vocab mismatch - this is the verb form, not the noun.
verification.grammar_notes: N5: ない negative, に target particle, question with か
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: negative question form
verification.overall_notes: Potential vocab mismatch - target is 答え (noun) but sentence uses 答える (verb). If this is acceptable as related form, grammar is N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 駅 appears as location with へ
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - えきへいきました
verification.grammar_notes: N5: へ direction, past tense ました
verification.difficulty_notes: Beginner N5: very simple past tense statement
verification.overall_notes: Simple N5 sentence.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 駅 appears as main topic
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - えきはどこですか
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, question word どこ, です copula, か question
verification.difficulty_notes: Beginner N5: basic location question
verification.overall_notes: Standard N5 location question.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 駅 appears as destination with に
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かのじょはなぜえきにいったのですか
verification.grammar_notes: Contains のです explanatory pattern (N4 grammar)
verification.difficulty_notes: Would be mid N5 except for N4 のです
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 のです pattern.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 大丈夫 appears as predicate
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - このせーたーはあらってもだいじょうぶです
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ても conditional/concessive form (even if), which is N4 grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Would be mid N5 except for N4 ても
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 ても conditional pattern.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 大丈夫 appears as predicate
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かのじょはいまのところだいじょうぶです
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, time expression 今のところ, です copula
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: uses time expression 今のところ (at the moment), straightforward structure
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 sentence with time expression.

verification.target_vocab_notes: だいじょうぶ appears twice in quotations
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - 「ぼくだいじょうぶ？」といわれました。「だいじょうぶ」とこたえました
verification.grammar_notes: Contains passive form われました (was said to/asked) which is N4 grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Complex with quoted speech and passive form
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 passive form われました.

verification.target_vocab_notes: だいじょうぶ appears twice
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match
verification.grammar_notes: Contains passive form われました (N4)
verification.difficulty_notes: Same as index 2
verification.overall_notes: Duplicate of index 2. Reject due to passive form.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 勉強 appears but target is べんきょうする (verb) while sentence uses 勉強部屋 (study room - compound noun). The verb form doesn't appear.
verification.kana_notes: Kana shows べんきょうへや but Japanese has 勉強部屋. Should be べんきょうべや with small や, not へや separately.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses N5: は topic, から from, て form with いく (go out). でていった is compound but basic N5 te-form + motion verb.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-upper N5: compound verb structure
verification.overall_notes: Target vocab mismatch - target is verb べんきょうする but sentence uses compound noun 勉強部屋. Also kana error.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 勉強 appears as topic (noun form of べんきょうする)
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - べんきょうはむずかしいの
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, い-adjective 難しい, の sentence-ending particle for casual question
verification.difficulty_rating_notes: Mid N5: simple question with adjective and casual の particle
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 casual question. Note: uses noun 勉強 not verb べんきょうする.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 勉強 appears as topic
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - べんきょうはじゅんちょうにいっています
verification.grammar_notes: Uses ている for ongoing state with 行く (going). This is basic N5 level.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-upper N5: adverb 順調に (smoothly), ている form, metaphorical use of 行く
verification.overall_notes: Grammatically N5 but vocabulary 順調に is somewhat advanced. Acceptable for upper N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 兄弟 appears as object of いる
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - あなたはなんにんきょうだいがいますか
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, question word 何人, が subject, います existence, か question
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: counter 何人 and standard family question pattern
verification.overall_notes: Standard N5 family question.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 兄弟 appears with counter
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かのじょにはきょうだいがさんにんいる
verification.grammar_notes: N5: には particle combination, が subject, counter 三人, いる existence
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: には particle combination, counter usage
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with particle combination and counter.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 兄弟 appears as topic
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かのじょにきょうだいはいない
verification.grammar_notes: N5: に particle, は topic, いない negative of いる
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: negative existence statement
verification.overall_notes: Simple N5 negative existence.

verification.target_vocab_notes: きょうだい appears as topic
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - きょうだいはなんにんですか
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, question word 何人, です copula, か question
verification.difficulty_notes: Beginner N5: simple question with counter
verification.overall_notes: Basic N5 family question.

verification.target_vocab_notes: きょうだい appears in genitive phrase
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - おんなのきょうだいはいません
verification.grammar_notes: N5: の possessive/modifier, は topic, いません negative polite
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: modifier phrase with の, polite negative
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with の modifier.

verification.target_vocab_notes: ごきょうだい appears with honorific ご prefix
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - ごきょうだいはいますか
verification.grammar_notes: N5: honorific prefix ご, は topic, います existence, か question
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: uses honorific prefix which is standard N5 politeness
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example showing honorific prefix usage.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 封筒 appears as object of ください
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - ふうとうをください
verification.grammar_notes: N5: を object, ください (please give) request form
verification.difficulty_notes: Beginner N5: simple request pattern
verification.overall_notes: Basic N5 request.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 封筒 appears as object of 切る
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かれはふうとうをきってひらけた
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, を object, て form connecting verbs, た past
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: te-form connection of two verbs in sequence
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example of te-form verb connection.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 封筒 appears in destination phrase
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - わたしはふうとうにきってをはるのをわすれた
verification.grammar_notes: Contains の nominalizer creating embedded clause (はるのを). This is N4 complexity.
verification.difficulty_notes: Too complex with nominalized embedded clause
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 の nominalizer creating complex embedded clause structure.

verification.target_vocab_notes: レコード appears as object of 聞く
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かのじょはよくなんじかんもれこーどをきいている
verification.grammar_notes: Uses ている for ongoing/habitual action (N5), adverb よく, time duration 何時間も
verification.difficulty_notes: Advanced N5: complex time expression 何時間も, ている habitual, adverb よく
verification.overall_notes: Grammatically N5 but challenging. Acceptable for upper N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: レコード appears as object of 買う
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かれらは、れこーどをかいます
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, を object, ます form
verification.difficulty_notes: Beginner N5: simple statement
verification.overall_notes: Simple N5 sentence.

verification.target_vocab_notes: レコード appears in possessive phrase
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - わたしはかのれこーどをいくつかきいた
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, possessive の, を object, いくつか (some/several), た past
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-upper N5: uses いくつか quantifier and possessive structure
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with quantifier いくつか.
